title: onosma stridii
intro: Onosma stridii, also known as Strid's onosma or Balkan onosma, is a species of flowering plant in the family Apocynaceae. The plant has been traditionally used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antibacterial effects. The health benefits associated with Onosma stridii include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and support the immune system. The plant is often used to make herbal preparations such as teas and infusions, which can be consumed to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
